visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The camera focuses on the back of a woman seated at a desk in a cluttered office environment. She is wearing a brown corduroy jacket over a light blue hoodie. A prominent white paper with printed Chinese characters is taped securely to her back. In the background, a laptop screen displays a video editing interface, and a white canvas bag hangs nearby. (2) Transition to a man with short black hair and glasses who is shown from the back, standing against a plain white wall. He wears a simple dark blue t-shirt with a rectangular piece of paper taped to his upper back. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of a standard office or studio setting. (3) The scene shifts to a woman seated at a wooden table, partially facing the camera. She is dressed in a beige sweater and is seen taking a sip from a yellow mug. On the table, several stacked yellow and blue lunch boxes are visible, with a printed note stuck to the top one. (4) A woman with dark hair pulled back into a ponytail is shown from behind, sitting in front of dual monitors that display video editing software. She is wearing a light blue denim jacket with a white note taped to her back. The background is filled with various office items and equipment. (5) A young woman sits in a grey fabric chair, looking down at her smartphone held with both hands. She wears a black jacket with yellow panels on the shoulders. A printed note is stuck to the front of her chair just below her lap. The setting appears to be a corner of an office. (6) A woman in a dark green and brown patterned top sits at a white desk, focusing on her laptop. A white paper note is taped to the back of the laptop screen. She picks up a white disposable coffee cup with a brown sleeve and takes a drink while continuing to look at the monitor. (7) The final shot shows two women sitting in a row at their desks. The woman in the foreground has a note on her back, while the woman behind her also has a note on her chair. They are both facing their computers, with various plush toys and office clutter visible in the surrounding area.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: POV:社交能力0%. [Slogan]: 沒事不要叫我 有事的話找別人. (2) [Variety]: POV:社交能力0%. [Slogan]: 倉庫都委外了 還不下單快一點. (3) [Variety]: POV:社交能力0%. [Slogan]: 別再問我有沒有新品 你們不買我怎麼出. (4) [Variety]: POV:社交能力0%. [Slogan]: 找我的話去官方IG留言 依時間順序回覆 不要插隊. (5) [Variety]: POV:社交能力0%. [Slogan]: 我沒有在玩手機 我是在剪片. (6) [Variety]: POV:社交能力0%. [Slogan]: 咖啡先來十杯 不然我沒辦法工作. (7) [Variety]: POV:社交能力0%. [Slogan]: 我是kiki 不是大姐姐. [Slogan]: 我妹在後面 不要找錯人.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-tempo, comedic orchestral background music track begins immediately, characterized by rapid staccato string notes and a bright, energetic tone. There are no human vocalizations or speech. The music features a consistent rhythmic pulse with a tempo of approximately 130 BPM, providing a playful atmosphere. (2) The playful orchestral music continues with the addition of rhythmic percussive accents that coincide with visual scene transitions. The acoustic texture remains bright and sharp, with no ambient office noise or incidental sounds detectable, suggesting a clean post-production audio track where the music is the sole signal. (3) The background music persists with its whimsical melody, dominated by string and woodwind sections. The beat remains steady and strong, driving the pacing of the video. The signal-to-noise ratio is perfect as there are no competing environmental sounds or speech throughout this segment.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Series of Examples -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide comedic entertainment by showcasing a collection of humorous, blunt, and socially reclusive notes written by office staff, reflecting a lighthearted take on introversion and workplace boundaries.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a consistent visual motif of text notes to deliver its punchlines, supported by a quirky variety-show style soundtrack.
